name: Peanut Butter Rounds
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. In a medium bowl, beat butter, peanut butter, sugar, egg and vanilla until the mixture is light and fluffy. Sift flour, baking soda and nutmeg into the peanut butter mixture. Add sesame seeds; stir until the ingredients are just combined. Form 1-inch balls of dough. Dip each ball in beaten egg white, then roll it in wheat germ. Place the balls on lightly greased cookie sheets about 1 to 2 inches apart. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes. Remove to a rack and let cool. Yield: About 3 dozen cookies.
